arts.ttl: Celtic teenager set for Premier League move? West Ham step up transfer interest
arts.sum: A prolific Celtic starlet could depart in the summer.

arts.ttl: Daniel Cummings nears West Ham transfer as Celtic to bank six-figure fee for prospect
arts.sum: Cummings made his first-team debut in the Champions League against to Aston Villa but is on his way out

arts.ttl: I could have joined Celtic for £2million but Rafa Benitez's stubbornness has left me thinking what might have been
arts.sum: Liverpool youngster Adam Hammill was wanted by the Hoops after impressing in a loan spell with Dunfermline in 2007

arts.ttl: Daniel Cummings issued Liverpool icon warning as Brendan Rodgers hints Celtic kid not quite there yet
arts.sum: And the boss pointed towards a former player he worked with at Liverpool in Raheem Sterling as an ideal role model for Cummings to look towards when it comes to being patient for a spot. Rodgers pointed to Raheem Sterling and Callum McGregor as examples to follow

arts.ttl: Matt O'Riley has astonished Celtic fans thinking the exact same thing as crazy Brighton mauling follows Rodgers love in
arts.sum: The midfielder couldn't prevent his side falling to a nightmare 7-0 humiliation at the hands of Nottingham Forest

arts.ttl: Kelechi Iheanacho primed to be a Celtic transfer smash hit as he's a maestro of Brendan Rodgers' 'golden rule'
arts.sum: The 28-year-old looks to be on the move this month after a disappointing six months in Spain

arts.ttl: Brendan Rodgers names Celtic youth player 'he really likes', chances of first-team breakthrough
arts.sum: The Celtic manager has a history of blooding younger players throughout his career and he did so again when his side squared off against Aston Villa in the Champions League . “Just because you’re a youth player at Celtic, it doesn’t mean then you go and play for the first team.

arts.ttl: Jota handed famous Celtic number as winger nabs it from outgoing teammate
arts.sum: Jota has been given No.7 jersey at Celtic after Luis Palma exit Of course, the number will always be synonymous at Celtic with the King of Kings, Henrik Larsson, but other players have worn it down the years.

arts.ttl: Celtic ‘In Talks’ to Sign ‘Deadly Finisher’ to Replace Kyogo
arts.sum: Celtic are in need of a striker and Kelechi Iheanacho is in their sights ahead of a last-minute loan deal, according to reports

arts.ttl: Kelechi Iheanacho targeted for Celtic transfer stunner as Brendan Rodgers craves reunion with his £25m man
arts.sum: Rodgers worked with the Nigeria striker who is now playing with Sevilla and the move would be a loan with an option to buy
